summary: Iteration 56: Phase 3 Services Module Testing - Song Library, Service Plans, Templates, Duplication, Music Stand. Backend: 20/20 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All Phase 3 pages load correctly with full functionality.

issues: Items show 'No lyrics or notes for this item' - this is expected behavior when songs don't have lyrics attached

backend.GET /api/admin/songs: PASS - Returns songs list with search support
backend.POST /api/admin/songs: PASS - Creates new song with all fields

frontend.search: PASS - Search filters songs by title/artist
frontend.add_song_dialog: PASS - Opens with Title, Artist, Key, BPM, CCLI, Lyrics fields
frontend.edit_delete_buttons: PASS - Edit and Delete buttons visible on each song row

frontend.create_plan_dialog: PASS - Opens with Title, Date, Service Type fields
frontend.expand_plan: PASS - Shows items, status controls, action buttons

frontend.from_template_button: PASS - 'From Template' button visible when templates exist

backend.GET /api/music-stand/{planId}: PASS - Public access (no auth), returns enriched items

frontend.set_list_sidebar: PASS - Shows items with type indicators
frontend.navigation: PASS - Previous/Next buttons work, sidebar click navigation works
frontend.item_display: PASS - Shows item title, type, duration, key, BPM

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 3 endpoints properly implement tenant isolation via tenant_id
Music Stand is correctly a public route (no auth required) for worship team access
Plan duplication correctly generates new UUIDs for items
Template system allows saving and reusing service plan structures
Song library supports search by title and artist with regex matching

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Phase 3 pages load, all dialogs work, navigation works)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with 'TEST_' prefix: songs, service plans, templates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified all Phase 3 Services Module features: Song Library CRUD with search, Service Plans CRUD with status management, Plan Duplication with (Copy) suffix, Templates save/create-from, Music Stand public view with navigation. All backend endpoints working (20/20 tests). All frontend pages loading with full functionality. Sidebar navigation correctly shows Services and Song Library under MINISTRY section. MOCKED: SolomonPay payment processing (UI scaffold only).

mocked_apis_list: SolomonPay payment processing - UI scaffold only

ui_tests_passed: Song Library page loads at /songs with 12+ songs
Song search filters songs by title/artist
Add Song dialog opens with all fields
Services page loads at /services with 30+ plans
Create Service Plan dialog opens with Title, Date, Service Type
Expanding plan shows items, status controls, Duplicate, Save Template, Music Stand buttons
Add Item button opens item form
Music Stand page loads at /music-stand/{planId} with dark theme
Music Stand sidebar item click navigation works
Sidebar shows Services and Song Library under MINISTRY section
